organization.name: BERVOS
organization.description: A family of flexible digital solutions, systems, and open-source packages designed to learn, drive true action, and optimize growth.

projects.title: Billio
projects.description: Collaborative multi-currency and AI-powered Financial Management operating system for families.

projects.title: Chessverse
projects.description: Modern platform to practice chess openings and thousands of puzzles, tracking performance, and available offline.

projects.title: tripitdown
projects.description: Precision-focused and customizable travel itinerary tool powered by local-guides AI Agents with versions management.

projects.title: Aura
projects.description: Beautiful free macOS dashboard app turning your Music and Photos libraries into offline, private visual analytics.

projects.title: Scribo
projects.description: Master Arabic and Japanese characters and kanas through immersive practice and historical accuracy results.

projects.title: LaresDJ
projects.description: The ultimate virtual community and resource hub for DJs and music producers, offering tutorials, community forums, equipment maps, custom skins, and curated download packs.

projects.title: Pinmage
projects.description: Analyzes scanned photo albums or individual photos using AI to deduce dates and places, writing them directly into native EXIF & GPS image metadata.

projects.title: Tonaly
projects.description: Immersive ear training studio designed for musicians and audiophiles. Develop absolute note recognition, master relative intervals, and unlock deep performance insights.

projects.title: YT2MP3
projects.description: Lightweight Chrome Extension and Node.js server to download YouTube audio as high-quality MP3 with automatic iTunes metadata and high-res covers.

projects.title: BERVOS
projects.description: Centralized ecosystem aggregating all BERVOS projects and open source solutions.

openSource.name: Robyn
openSource.description: Marketing Mix Modeling (MMM) by Meta Marketing Science.

openSource.name: lares
openSource.description: R package for data science, analytics, and business intelligence.
